title: Meta is having trouble with rogue AI agents
summary: A rogue AI agent at Meta inadvertently exposed company and user data to unauthorized engineers, highlighting risks in deploying autonomous AI systems without proper access controls.
content: A rogue AI agent inadvertently exposed Meta company and user data to engineers who didn't have permission to see it.

title: The FBI is buying Americans’ location data
summary: FBI Director Kash Patel testified that the agency purchases commercially available location data to track people's movements without warrants under the Electronic Communications Privacy Act. Patel refused to commit to ending the practice despite senators' concerns.
content:
WASHINGTON, DC - MARCH 18: Federal Bureau of Investigation Director Kash Patel testifies during a Senate Intelligence Committee hearing on worldwide threats in the Hart Senate Office Building on March 18, 2026 in Washington, DC. A closed session immediately followed the hearing. (Photo by Kevin Dietsch/Getty Images) | Getty Images	

FBI director Kash Patel admitted that the agency is buying location data that can be used to track people's movements. Unlike information obtained from cell phone providers, this data can be accessed without a warrant - and used to track anyone. 
"We do purchase commercially available information that's consistent with the Constitution and the laws under the Electronic Communications Privacy Act, and it has led to some valuable intelligence for us," Patel said at a hearing before the Senate Intelligence Committee on Wednesday. 
Patel would not commit to senators' requests that the agency stop buying Americans' location data. "Doing that wi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.summary: FBI局长卡什·帕特尔作证称，该机构购买商业上可获得的位置数据来追踪人们的行动，无需根据《电子通信隐私法》获得搜查令。帕特尔拒绝承诺结束这一做法，尽管参议员表示担忧。

Patel a refusé de s'engager à mettre fin à cette pratique malgré les préoccupations des sénateurs.

Patel weigerte sich, sich der Beendigung der Praxis zu verpflichten, trotz der Bedenken der Senatoren.

Patel se negó a comprometerse a terminar la práctica a pesar de las preocupaciones de los senadores.

title: Amazon doesn’t want the blame for the Post Office going under
summary: Amazon is defending its plan to cut USPS shipments by two-thirds, claiming the postal service "abruptly walked away" from contract negotiations expiring this fall. The move comes as USPS faces severe financial difficulties.
content:
Amazon is going on the defensive after a report from The Wall Street Journal revealed that the ecommerce giant plans to slash shipments with the United States Postal Service, which said this week that it's running out of money. In a lengthy statement published on Wednesday, Amazon says it didn't want to reduce shipments with the USPS, and that negotiations only stalled after the USPS "abruptly walked away" from negotiations for a new contract.
As reported by the WSJ, Amazon plans to cut packages sent through the USPS by at least two-thirds by this fall, around the same time its contract with the independent federal agency is set to expire.  …

title: Congress considers blowing up internet law
summary: Senate lawmakers from both parties are pursuing legislative challenges to Section 230, the internet platforms' liability shield, citing ongoing legal battles and bipartisan concerns about government censorship. Senators argued the decades-old law can and should be reformed.
content:
Internet platforms' liability shield Section 230 faced another round of attack at a Senate Commerce Committee hearing on Wednesday, this time with two distinct undercurrents complicating the conversation. One was an unprecedented wave of ongoing legal challenges to the law's scope, and the second was a heightened bipartisan concern over government censorship.
"Section 230 is not one of the Ten Commandments," Sen. Brian Schatz (D-HI) said in his opening remarks. "This idea that we can't touch it, otherwise internet freedom incinerates, is preposterous." Sens. Dick Durbin (D-IL) and Lindsey Graham (R-SC) have introduced a bill to sunset Secti …
Read the full story at The Verge.

Les sénateurs ont soutenu que cette loi vieille de plusieurs décennies peut et devrait être réformée.

Die Senatoren argumentierten, dass dieses Jahrzehnte alte Gesetz reformiert werden kann und sollte.

Los senadores argumentaron que la ley de décadas de antigüedad puede y debe ser reformada.

title: Hoto’s powerful PixelDrive electric screwdriver is 25 percent off
summary: Hoto's PixelDrive electric screwdriver is discounted to $59.99 from $79.99, offering six torque levels, dual speed settings, and a 2,000mAh battery. The tool includes a built-in display and 360-degree LED light for enhanced precision and visibility.
content:
Hoto makes electric screwdrivers for different budgets. If you don’t want to spend much, you can get its most basic model, which we’ve recommended many times. That one comes with 25 bits, and has three levels of torque for $29.99 (usually $59.99). But if you want more power and versatility, its PixelDrive model might be the better option. It offers six levels of torque, plus two speed options: 80RPM for precision-oriented tasks, and a 200RPM setting for faster action. Hoto has knocked $20 off its price, and you can pick it up for $59.99 at Amazon.
Hoto PixelDrive
Hoto’s latest electric screwdriver delivers an adjustable 6Nm of torque, along with a built-in pixelated display that lets you check the battery life and other info.

Where to Buy:

 $79.99 $59.99 at Amazon

The PixelDrive also offers more bits than Hoto’s basic model (30 versus 25) and a bigger battery (2,000mAh versus 1,500). This model features a 360-degree LED light near the bit to illuminate where you need to screw or unscrew, and its display shows the battery level as well as your torque selection. While the carrying case included with the affordable Hoto electric model is already miles ahead of what’s included with most competing products, the stacking cylindrical bit case set included with the PixelDrive goes a step further. Its camera lens-inspired design should blend in a little more easily wherever you like to tinker.

title: Kasa’s Matter-compatible smart plugs are on sale for $11 a pop
summary: Kasa Smart Wi-Fi Plug Slim units are available at discounted prices with Matter support for smart home integration, energy monitoring, and a compact design that avoids blocking adjacent outlets.
content:
With the smart plugs, you can schedule lights to turn on and off while you’re away on spring break. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

If you’re looking for an easy and affordable way to add smarts to your home, you can buy two Kasa Smart Wi-Fi Plug Slim smart plugs on sale for $21.99 ($8 off) at Amazon and B&H Photo. That’s the bundle’s best price in months and a good opportunity to upgrade things you already own instead of replacing them with pricier smart devices.
TP-Link Kasa Smart Wi-Fi Plug Slim (KP125M)

Where to Buy:

 $39.99 $21.99 at Amazon (two-pack)
 $29.99 $21.99 at B&H Photo (two-pack)

The plugs let you add smart controls to devices like lamps, fans, chargers, coffee makers, and heaters. All you need is plug one into an outlet and connect it to your Wi-Fi network, and you can automate whatever’s attached using the Kasa app on your phone. You can also control stuff with your voice thanks to Matter support, which lets the plugs work with major smart home platforms like Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant. That means you can turn lights on or off when you’re out of town or, for example, schedule a fan so that it turns on a few minutes before you return home.
Another advantage is that the plug also includes energy monitoring, which tracks how much electricity your devices are using. That’s handy information that can help better understand your power consumption, and potentially save money on electricity bills. The slim design is also helpful: unlike bulkier smart plugs that can block neighboring outlets, these are small enough that you can plug two into a single wall outlet.

summary: Security researchers disclosed a "DarkSword" exploit targeting iPhones on iOS 18.4 to 18.6.2 that allows hackers to extract personal data through malicious links, already exploited by Russian attackers.
content:
If you've been putting off an update to iOS 26, now might be the time to do it. On Wednesday, security researchers published findings on a new hacking tool that targets iPhones running iOS 18.4 to 18.6.2, as reported earlier by Wired. The "DarkSword" exploit allows bad actors to scoop up the personal information on iPhones that visit malicious links, and has already been used by Russian hackers.
The Google Threat Intelligence Group worked with the cybersecurity firms Lookout and iVerify to analyze the attack, which could affect up to 270 million devices still running the impacted versions of iOS 18. When a user accesses a compromised websit …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.summary: 使用设备上面部识别的年龄验证技术旨在通过在本地处理数据而不是在中央服务器上处理来降低隐私风险。然而，人们对该方法是否能有效降低隐私风险仍存在重大信任顾虑。

fr.title: Après le fiasco de Discord, la technologie de vérification d'âge promet la confidentialité en s'exécutant localement. Est-ce que ça marche?
fr.summary: La technologie de vérification d'âge utilisant la reconnaissance faciale sur l'appareil vise à réduire les risques de confidentialité en traitant les données localement plutôt que sur des serveurs centralisés. Cependant, des préoccupations importantes concernant la confiance persistent quant à savoir si cette approche atténue efficacement les risques de confidentialité.

de.title: Nach Discord-Skandal verspricht Altersverifikationstechnologie Datenschutz durch lokale Ausführung. Funktioniert es?
de.summary: Die Altersverifikationstechnologie mit Gesichtserkennung auf dem Gerät zielt darauf ab, Datenschutzrisiken zu verringern, indem Daten lokal verarbeitet werden, anstatt sie auf zentralisierten Servern zu verarbeiten. Es bleiben jedoch erhebliche Vertrauensbedenken bestehen, ob dieser Ansatz Datenschutzrisiken wirksam mindert.

es.title: Después del fiasco de Discord, la tecnología de verificación de edad promete privacidad al ejecutarse localmente. ¿Funciona?
es.summary: La tecnología de verificación de edad que utiliza reconocimiento facial en el dispositivo tiene como objetivo reducir los riesgos de privacidad al procesar datos localmente en lugar de en servidores centralizados. Sin embargo, persisten preocupaciones significativas sobre la confianza sobre si el enfoque mitiga efectivamente los riesgos de privacidad.

title: Here's BMW's first all-electric 3 series, the 2027 i3
summary: BMW is launching the 2027 i3, its first all-electric 3-series sedan, building on the strong market reception of its iX3 electric SUV. The model is expected to extend the success of BMW's EV platform to the core sedan segment.
content: The iX3 SUV was very good; we think the i3 sedan will be even better.

zh.title: 这是宝马首款全电动3系，2027 i3
zh.summary: 宝马推出2027款i3，这是其首款全电动3系轿车，基于其iX3电动SUV的强劲市场反应。该车型预计将宝马电动车平台的成功扩展到核心轿车细分市场。

fr.title: Voici la première série 3 entièrement électrique de BMW, la i3 2027
fr.summary: BMW lance la i3 2027, sa première berline 3 de série entièrement électrique, s'appuyant sur la forte réception du marché de son SUV électrique iX3. Le modèle devrait étendre le succès de la plateforme de véhicules électriques de BMW au segment des berlines centrales.

de.title: Hier ist BMWs erstes vollelektrisches 3er, der 2027 i3
de.summary: BMW startet die 2027 i3, seine erste vollelektrische 3er-Limousine, aufbauend auf der starken Marktakzeptanz des iX3-Elektro-SUV. Das Modell soll den Erfolg der EV-Plattform von BMW auf das Kern-Limousinen-Segment ausweiten.

es.title: Aquí está el primer i3 100% eléctrico de BMW, el 2027 i3
es.summary: BMW está lanzando el i3 2027, su primer sedán 3 totalmente eléctrico, aprovechando la fuerte aceptación del mercado de su SUV eléctrico iX3. Se espera que el modelo extienda el éxito de la plataforma de vehículos eléctricos de BMW al segmento de sedanes centrales.

title: BMW brings back the i3 as a funky four-door EV
summary: BMW's new i3 sedan shares the Neue Klasse platform with the iX3 SUV, featuring the same powertrain and electronics in a traditional sedan body. The model applies BMW's new and controversial design language to the company's historically core segment.
content:
BMW's new class of EVs begins with the iX3 SUV, but you had to know it wouldn't end there. The company's engineers didn't spend all that time working up a completely redesigned and substantially more efficient EV platform just for one crossover, and now it's time for the second wave.
Meet the new i3, which takes the same basic motor, battery, and electronics package that powers the iX3, plus the Neue Klasse's controversial styling cues, and applies it to a more familiar sedan shape, the sort of silhouette that BMW's reputation was largely built upon. 
It definitely looks a lot like the iX3, but with a slightly different intent. Sebastian K …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 宝马以时髦的四门电动车身份带回i3
zh.summary: 宝马的新款i3轿车与iX3 SUV共享Neue Klasse平台，在传统轿车车身中采用相同的动力系统和电子产品。该车型将宝马新的有争议的设计语言应用于该公司历来的核心细分市场。

fr.title: BMW ramène la i3 comme un VE amusant à quatre portes
fr.summary: La nouvelle berline i3 de BMW partage la plateforme Neue Klasse avec le SUV iX3, avec le même groupe motopropulseur et l'électronique dans une carrosserie de berline traditionnelle. Le modèle applique le nouveau langage de design controversé de BMW au segment historiquement central de l'entreprise.

de.title: BMW bringt den i3 als funkigen viertürigen EV zurück
de.summary: Der neue i3 von BMW teilt die Neue Klasse-Plattform mit dem iX3-SUV und verfügt über denselben Antriebsstrang und die Elektronik in einer traditionellen Limousinen-Karosserie. Das Modell wendet BMWs neue und umstrittene Designsprache auf das historisch zentrale Segment des Unternehmens an.

es.title: BMW trae de vuelta el i3 como un funky EV de cuatro puertas
es.summary: El nuevo sedán i3 de BMW comparte la plataforma Neue Klasse con el SUV iX3, presentando el mismo tren motriz y electrónica en una carrocería de sedán tradicional. El modelo aplica el nuevo y controvertido lenguaje de diseño de BMW al segmento históricamente central de la empresa.
